synopsis:
### Cflat is a collection of C data structures and algorithms.

### Conventions:

- All library functions must be prefixed with cflat_
- Internal functions must be prefixed with cflat__
- All library functions have an alias without the cflat_ prefix, which can be disabled with by defining CFLAT_XXX_NO_ALIAS to 1

- Types of constructors:
    - cflat_xxx_alloc:
        - Allocates memory for an object and returns a pointer to it
        - Takes in `CflatArena *a` as first argument
    - cflat_xxx_new:
        - Allocates memory and initializes the object
        - Takes in `CflatArena *a` as first argument
    - cflat_xxx_init:
        - Initializes memory
        - Should never allocate memory
    - cflat_xxx_lit:
        - Creates an object using a compund literal
        - Should be able to be used in static initialization

- Types of destructors:
    - cflat_xxx_delete:
        - Frees memory
    - cflat_xxx_clear:
        - Makes object ready for reuse should never free memory

- Scope macros:
    - Macros of the form cflat_xxx_scope, will be inplemented as a for loop and must be used with a block scope
    ```c
    TempArena temp;
    // gets a temporary arena
    cflat_scratch_arena_scope(temp) {
        ...
    }
    // resets the temporary arena
    ```

doc.description: Initializes a new arena in a preallocated region of memory

functions.name: cflat_arena_memory_mapped
functions.params: const char *filepath, usize size_hint, CflatPermission mode
functions.decl: CFLAT_DEF CflatArena* cflat_arena_memory_mapped (const char *filepath, usize size_hint, CflatPermission mode );

doc.description: Allocates a new arena in a memory mapped file

params.filepath: path to the file, relative or absolute
params.size_hint: minimum size in bytes to allocate for the memory mapped region
params.mode: permissions of the memory mapped region

doc.description: Allocates a new arena using os specific memory allocation

functions.name: cflat_arena_try_push_opt
functions.params: CflatArena *arena, usize size, void **mem, CflatAllocOpt opt
functions.decl: CFLAT_DEF bool cflat_arena_try_push_opt (CflatArena *arena, usize size, void **mem, CflatAllocOpt opt );

doc.description: Clears the arena, making it possible to reuse the memory

Destroys the arena
For each node on the arena
    Frees  memory - if the node was allocated
    Unmaps memory - if the node was memory mapped
    Nothing       - if the node was preallocated
Deallocates size bytes of memory from the arena

Sets the arena position to the requested point
Allocates more memory if position is greater than the whats currently in the arena

functions.name: cflat_arena_extend_opt
functions.params: CflatArena *arena, void *ptr, usize oldsize, usize newsize, CflatAllocOpt opt
functions.decl: CFLAT_DEF void* cflat_arena_extend_opt (CflatArena *arena, void *ptr, usize oldsize, usize newsize, CflatAllocOpt opt);

doc.description:
Takes a region of memory inside the arena and returns a bigger one containing the same information
The region can be the same if theres enough space in the arena but that is not a garantee

params.oldsize: the size of the old region of memory
params.newsize: the size of the new region of memory

doc.returns: the new region of memory of size newsize

functions.name: cflat_arena_push_opt
functions.decl: CFLAT_DEF void* cflat_arena_push_opt (CflatArena *arena, usize size, CflatAllocOpt opt );

doc.description: Allocates size bytes of memory from the arena

Returns a pointer the end of the arena
The pointer is outside the adress range of the arena

params.align: memory alignment of the pointer allocated
params.clear: weather or not the allocated memory should be zeroed

params.reserve: how much memory should reserved but not yet commited
params.commit: how much memory should be commited
params.fixed_size: weather or not the arena can gorw by allocate new arena nodes

params.conflicts: array of arenas that should be filtered out
